body.title: CC Nightly: pattern extraction from transcripts
body.result: cc_nightly_pattern_mining.py: 8-pattern detector, scores by frequency, writes palace.patterns.* nodes; today: master-control 1.00, compiled-inference 1.00
body.description:
Extract design patterns and preferences from session transcripts.

**Affected files:** lab/design_docs/patterns/ (updated), palace nodes
**Design rules:** autonomous-learning, pattern-recognition
**Scope boundary:**
  IN: Analyze transcript for recurring patterns (e.g., 'Akien prefers master control'), extract with confidence scores
  OUT: General-purpose insights (separate ticket)
**Completion criteria:**
  1. Read transcript, find design patterns mentioned or implicit in decisions
  2. Identify patterns: 'master control + circuit breaker = resilience preference'
  3. Score confidence (how many times reinforced)
  4. Update palace.patterns.* nodes
  5. Test: today's transcript yields 'master control' pattern with confidence >0.8
